title: Savory Syrian Runner Beans Stir-fry
description: A sour and dense one-pot Syrian dish featuring runner beans that are marinated before stir-frying for a delicious halal-friendly meal.
instructions: Wash the runner beans and cut them into bite-sized pieces.
Peel and finely chop the onion, mince the garlic cloves, and thinly slice the chili peppers.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add cumin seeds and sauté until they turn light golden brown.
Add chopped onions to the pan and cook for about 3 minutes until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic and sliced red chilies, cooking for another minute until fragrant.
Gently toss the marinated runner beans into the pan. Pour in lemon juice while stirring continuously.
Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the beans are tender but still crisp, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with pita bread or rice.
